goal: Continuum Lift Conditions and Screen-Only Dictionary Obstruction
claim_boundary: proof-ready obstruction theorem under explicit lift hypotheses; no continuum de Sitter, dS/CFT, or ER=EPR construction is claimed

major_claims.claim: The finite-to-continuum lift conditions are explicit.
The declared finite screen-shadow functor agrees on the quantum matrix regulator and dephased abelian control.
The operator-norm response witness separates M_N from C^N with finite gap one.
Approximate consecutive UCP embeddings are available as a finite replacement for exact full-matrix inclusions.
The approximate embedding errors decrease in the bounded family.
A screen-only dictionary is incomplete under the lift conditions when screen shadows collide and response witnesses stay separated.
The current branch selects the theorem-candidate endpoint rather than a no-go.

frontier: instantiate the lift conditions with a canonical fuzzy-sphere/static-patch embedding
prove response-witness persistence for a canonical physical regulator family
upgrade the conditional theorem to a continuum operator-algebra theorem
